description: This pipeline removes labels touching the edges of an image and then converts the resulting label map into a set of regions of interest, where each region corresponds to a unique label value greater than zero, preserving spatial information from higher-dimensional data.

3f58a7b5-659d-4f6b-946e-2aec5585596c.name: clij:plugin:net.haesleinhuepf.clij2.plugins.ExcludeLabelsOnEdges
3f58a7b5-659d-4f6b-946e-2aec5585596c.description:
Removes all labels from a label map which touch the edges of the image (in X, Y and Z if the image is 3D).

Remaining label elements are renumbered afterwards.

Parameters: Image label_map_input, ByRef Image label_map_destination
Available for: 2D, 3D



Please be aware that this node was generated automatically by JIPipe from existing interfaces provided by CLIJ. Please contact the JIPipe developers if you find any issues.

65fccf35-d54e-4d77-91f3-4f73eb7c0675.name: ij1-labels-to-roi
65fccf35-d54e-4d77-91f3-4f73eb7c0675.description: Converts a label image into a set of ROI. Labels must have a value larger than zero to be detected.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice. The Z/C/T coordinates of the source slices are saved inside the ROI.
